001package sting.processor;
002
003import java.util.Set;
004import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
005
006/**
007 * Immutable metadata for one effective interceptor binding on one service coordinate.
008 */
009public interface InterceptorBindingModel
010{
011  @Nonnull
012  String annotationTypeName();
013
014  int priority();
015
016  @Nonnull
017  String serviceTypeName();
018
019  @Nonnull
020  String qualifierKey();
021
022  @Nonnull
023  Set<String> valueNames();
024
025  @Nonnull
026  BindingValueModel value( @Nonnull String name );
027}
